description_html:
How do you take a BIG idea like the importance of Independence Day and make it accessible for young readers without watering down the truth? Look no further than Steve Deace and his new book, ‘Why Independence Day? America is Great Because God is Good‘. Steve recently joined Frank on his recent tour of the […]

The post Be Worthy of the Bullet That Charlie Kirk Took For You — Why Independence Day? with Steve Deace PLUS Q&A appeared first on CrossExamined.
